summary.en: Oman applies GSO EMC standards, which adopt the IEC/CISPR EMC framework, to motor-driven tools, electronic speed controllers, chargers, and power supplies. The product must not generate excessive electromagnetic disturbance and must have adequate immunity, and EMC results are reviewed within Oman national conformity managed by MOCIIP and the DGSM. Where a cordless tool contains a radio module, EMC review sits alongside separate TRA radio approval.
summary.zh: 阿曼对电机驱动工具、电子调速器、充电器和电源适用采纳 IEC/CISPR 框架的 GSO 电磁兼容标准。产品不得产生过量电磁骚扰，并应具备足够抗扰度，EMC 结果在 MOCIIP 与 DGSM 管理的阿曼国家符合性评定中审查。凡无绳工具含射频模块，EMC 审查与单独的 TRA 无线电核准并行。
summary.zht: 阿曼對電機驅動工具、電子調速器、充電器和電源適用採納 IEC/CISPR 框架的 GSO 電磁相容標準。產品不得產生過量電磁騷擾，並應具備足夠抗擾度，EMC 結果在 MOCIIP 與 DGSM 管理的阿曼國家符合性評定中審查。凡無繩工具含射頻模組，EMC 審查與單獨的 TRA 無線電核准並行。

standards_or_laws: GSO EMC standards adopting IEC / CISPR EMC framework
Oman national conformity (MOCIIP / DGSM) review of EMC evidence
TRA radio approval for cordless tools with a wireless module [separate from EMC]

summary.en: China compliance packages may include GB EMC reports alongside GB/T 3883 safety reports. Test limits, configuration, worst-case operating modes, charger inclusion, and declaration wording still need Oman-specific review against the adopted GSO EMC standards.
summary.zh: 中国合规包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全报告之外包含 GB EMC 报告。测试限值、配置、最不利工况、是否包含充电器以及声明措辞，仍需按阿曼采纳的 GSO EMC 标准进行针对性复核。
summary.zht: 中國合規包可能在 GB/T 3883 安全報告之外包含 GB EMC 報告。測試限值、配置、最不利工況、是否包含充電器以及聲明措辭，仍需按阿曼採納的 GSO EMC 標準進行針對性覆核。

standards_or_laws: China GB EMC standards and test reports where applicable

gap.en: A frequent gap is a report that tests only the bare tool but omits the charger, battery pack, electronic controller variants, or worst-case load conditions, and is not mapped to the GSO EMC limits Oman recognises. The conformity file should show the exact marketed configuration and the adopted GSO/CISPR limits.
gap.zh: 常见差距是报告只测试裸工具，遗漏充电器、电池包、电子控制器变体或最不利负载条件，且未映射到阿曼认可的 GSO EMC 限值。符合性文件应显示实际销售配置及采纳的 GSO/CISPR 限值。
gap.zht: 常見差距是報告只測試裸工具，遺漏充電器、電池包、電子控制器變體或最不利負載條件，且未映射到阿曼認可的 GSO EMC 限值。符合性文件應顯示實際銷售配置及採納的 GSO/CISPR 限值。

target.en: Mandatory: EMC conformity for in-scope apparatus under the adopted GSO EMC standards, reviewed within Oman national conformity (MOCIIP / DGSM). Radio modules additionally trigger separate TRA approval.
target.zh: 强制：适用设备须按采纳的 GSO EMC 标准证明电磁兼容符合性，并在阿曼国家符合性评定（MOCIIP / DGSM）中审查。射频模块另须取得单独的 TRA 核准。
target.zht: 強制：適用設備須按採納的 GSO EMC 標準證明電磁相容符合性，並在阿曼國家符合性評定（MOCIIP / DGSM）中審查。射頻模組另須取得單獨的 TRA 核准。

cn.en: China domestic files may include GB EMC evidence, but Oman acceptance depends on scope, limits, configuration, and mapping to the adopted GSO standards.
cn.zh: 中国境内文件可包含 GB EMC 证据，但阿曼接受性取决于范围、限值、配置及与采纳 GSO 标准的映射。
cn.zht: 中國境內文件可包含 GB EMC 證據，但阿曼接受性取決於範圍、限值、配置及與採納 GSO 標準的映射。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Oman-ready until EMC evidence covers the actual marketed tool system, is mapped to the adopted GSO EMC limits, and clears Oman national conformity under MOCIIP and the DGSM, with TRA approval handled separately for any radio module.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在 EMC 证据覆盖实际销售的工具系统、映射到采纳的 GSO EMC 限值，并通过 MOCIIP 与 DGSM 的阿曼国家符合性评定，且对任何射频模块单独取得 TRA 核准前，不能视为阿曼就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在 EMC 證據覆蓋實際銷售的工具系統、映射到採納的 GSO EMC 限值，並通過 MOCIIP 與 DGSM 的阿曼國家符合性評定，且對任何射頻模組單獨取得 TRA 核准前，不能視為阿曼就緒。
